info.name: GitHub Get Ghes Node Metadata for All Nodes

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID which identifies a node.

params.name: cluster_roles
params.description: The cluster roles from the cluster configuration file.

items.docs: Get node metadata for all configured nodes in the current cluster. For more information, see "[About clustering](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-server@3.9/admin/enterprise-management/configuring-clustering/about-clustering)."

info.name: GitHub Get the Status of Services Running on All Replica Nodes

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID which identifies a node.

params.name: cluster_roles
params.description: The cluster roles from the cluster configuration file.

items.docs:
Gets the status of all services running on each replica node.
This endpoint may take several seconds to reply.

info.name: GitHub Get All Ghes Release Versions for All Nodes

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID which identifies a node.

params.name: cluster_roles
params.description: The cluster roles from the cluster configuration file.

items.docs: Gets the GitHub Enterprise Server release versions that are currently installed on all available nodes. For more information, see "[GitHub Enterprise Server releases](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-server@3.9/admin/all-releases)."
